title: Arthromeris moulmeinensis

The classification of Arthromeris moulmeinensis places it within the larger group of vascular plants, specifically the division Pteridophyta. Within the family Polypodiaceae, it is a member of the subfamily Polypodioideae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties.
